No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (4.3) and essential language/communication skills (4.4) for foreign degree students. It also enhances cultural awareness through daily life content, aligning with sustainable development and cultural diversity (4.7).
evidence: This course is only available to foreign degree students at NCCU
enhance contextual awareness while learning language knowledge
